covered_report_window: Companies reporting after the U.S. market close on Thursday, June 25, 2026, plus companies reporting before the U.S. market open on Friday, June 26, 2026.
market_context_summary: U.S. trading was mixed: Micron revived AI-memory enthusiasm, but hot PCE/inflation concerns, Iran-related fuel-price risk, and sensitivity to forward guidance kept the earnings tape selective.

top_setups.note: Only three confirmed U.S.-listed ranked names met the strict window and source-quality screen. Several raw calendar entries were excluded as stale, already reported, estimated-only, outside the window, foreign/OTC, or too thin.

ranked_companies.expected_driver: Q1 backlog/margins and FY2027 guide tone
ranked_companies.key_risk_to_call: Cost savings or Kalwall relief upside
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: APOG leans down because the market is likely to focus on backlog quality, lower FY2027 EPS guidance versus FY2026, and lingering margin pressure rather than a simple EPS beat.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Apogee confirmed Q1 FY2027 results before the June 26 open; public preview data cluster around $0.41-$0.46 EPS and about $334M-$341M revenue, while company FY2027 guidance is $1.38B-$1.43B sales and $2.70-$3.25 adjusted EPS.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Q1 margins hold, Fortify savings are visible, cash flow stays solid, and management frames Kalwall as accretive without cutting guidance.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Architectural Services backlog keeps declining, aluminum/health-cost pressure persists, or management sounds more cautious on nonresidential demand.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: TipRanks listed APOG weekly implied move near +/-10.3%; Stocktwits showed modest attention and market cap below $1B, so positioning data are useful but not decisive.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Coverage is sparse; the key revision risk is whether FY2027 EPS guidance is reaffirmed after already sitting below FY2026 adjusted EPS.
ranked_companies.pass_agreement: All three passes Lean Down with tight spread.

ranked_companies.timing: After market close, Thursday, June 25, 2026; 5:00 p.m. ET call
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: AOUT has a low-bar relief setup if management holds FY2026 expectations and validates retail sell-through, but margin and tariff pressure cap conviction.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Consensus-type calendar data point to roughly breakeven EPS and $48M-$49M revenue for Q4; the market will likely care more about FY2026 sales, gross margin, and FY2027 tone.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Guide hold, POS strength, Outdoor Lifestyle momentum, new products, and debt-free balance sheet drive relief.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Tariffs, gross-margin compression, weak Shooting Sports, or cautious retail-order commentary overpower the low bar.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Public options data were limited; StockTitan cited short interest near 5.2% of shares and 14.5 days to cover as of May 29, which raises both relief-squeeze potential and reversal risk.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Sparse coverage; Q3 beat estimates but sales still fell 3.3% year over year and gross margin compressed to 41.0%.
ranked_companies.pass_agreement: Two Lean Up passes, one Neutral/Up pass; disagreement modest but reversal risk stayed above allocation cutoff.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: CNVS has an attractive acquisition-driven FY2027 story, but the stock is too thin and volatile, with cash and integration risks too large for a directional edge.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: The market likely cares less about Q4 EPS and more about whether management can defend $115M-$120M FY2027 revenue and $10M-$20M adjusted EBITDA guidance after Giant and IndiCue.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Management shows clean acquisition integration, recurring revenue strength, and credible EBITDA conversion from Matchpoint and ad monetization.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Liquidity, dilution, weak Q4 revenue, or acquisition execution doubts overwhelm the growth narrative.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: TipRanks listed CNVS implied move near +/-47.8%; Stocktwits showed bearish sentiment around 35 and thin trading, making event risk extreme.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Recent Q3 showed revenue down 60% year over year due to a difficult theatrical comp, though adjusted EBITDA improved sequentially and FY2027 guidance stepped up after acquisitions.
ranked_companies.pass_agreement: One mild-up pass, one neutral pass, one cautious/downside-risk pass; high disparity versus the other ranked names.

excluded_names.reason: Absolute direction score was not above 30 after averaging.
Absolute direction score was not above 30 and reversal risk was above 40.
Consensus remained Neutral / No Edge with very high reversal risk and high pass disparity.

research_allocation_view.plain_statement: This is a research prioritization model, not financial advice. The full notional basket remains unallocated because no name passed all allocation filters.

detailed_company_sections.consensus_summary: Pass A/B/C averaged to -30 direction score, 37 reversal risk, and 8 disparity.
detailed_company_sections.recommendation: Lean Down; monitor but not allocation-qualified.
detailed_company_sections.key_metric: Q1 backlog/margins and FY2027 guide tone
detailed_company_sections.base_case: Softer backlog and margin pressure keep shares under pressure.
detailed_company_sections.bull_case: Cost savings and Kalwall commentary create relief upside.
detailed_company_sections.bear_case: Guide tone confirms weaker architectural demand and margin drag.
detailed_company_sections.allocation_rationale: Excluded because absolute score did not exceed 30, despite low reversal risk and low disparity.

detailed_company_sections.consensus_summary: Pass A/B/C averaged to +27 direction score, 43 reversal risk, and 9 disparity.
detailed_company_sections.base_case: Low bar supports relief if guidance holds.
detailed_company_sections.bull_case: POS growth and new products validate demand.
detailed_company_sections.bear_case: Tariffs and retailer caution pressure margins.
detailed_company_sections.allocation_rationale: Excluded because score was below 30 and reversal risk exceeded 40.

detailed_company_sections.consensus_summary: Pass A/B/C averaged to +20 direction score, 68 reversal risk, and 24 disparity.
detailed_company_sections.base_case: Story is promising but too volatile for a directional edge.
detailed_company_sections.bull_case: Acquisition synergies and recurring revenue prove credible.
detailed_company_sections.bear_case: Liquidity, dilution, or integration risk dominate.
detailed_company_sections.allocation_rationale: Excluded because consensus score was below 30, reversal risk was very high, and disparity was elevated.

disclaimer_text: This is research, not financial advice. Earnings reactions are highly uncertain and can be driven by market positioning, guidance, macro conditions, and management commentary rather than reported results alone.
